summary: No concrete installer-harm evidence; name resembles popular Tailwind CSS ecosystem
details: Package name `tailwind-core` is in close proximity to the widely-used Tailwind CSS ecosystem (tailwindcss, @tailwindcss/*). No malicious behavior was identified in the package contents: no install-time lifecycle exfiltration, no remote fetch-and-execute, no credential access, no silent-relay, and no install-time destruction. Routing to human review so a reviewer can confirm whether the package is a legitimate Tailwind-related utility, an unrelated reuse of the name, or a name-confusion risk against the Tailwind namespace.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
